sub_modules.fixed_poly_eval: Combinational Horner evaluator for the cubic polynomial in signed fixed-point format.
sub_modules.fixed_poly_derivative: Combinational evaluator for the polynomial derivative in signed fixed-point format.
sub_modules.fixed_point_divider: Combinational signed fixed-point divider used to compute the Newton correction term.
sub_modules.fixed_newton_step: Combinational Newton update block that subtracts the correction term or holds on divide-by-zero.
sub_modules.fixed_root_verify: Combinational verification block that checks the residual magnitude against tolerance.
